content: Illustrative Moody's-style issuer credit assessment for Meridian Freight, dated 2025-11-11 on Q3 fundamentals as of 2025-09-30. Elevated leverage and thin interest coverage place Meridian at Baa3, the lowest investment-grade notch. This assessment keeps Meridian just inside investment grade; the other anchor places it just below, so the single-notch gap crosses the investment-grade / high-yield boundary.
